checks.description: Every var(--elements-...) reference must exist in the token allowlist.
Prototype CSS must not hard-code hex, rgb, rgba, hsl, or hsla color values.
Prototype CSS must not hard-code px values.
The prototype must link the local Elements tokens.css file.
Generated prototype CSS must not directly reference --elements-color-core-* tokens; use semantic, component-specific, or data visualization color tokens instead.

Green tokens are reserved for explicit success/status meanings or deliberately labeled data series; primary dashboard charts, progress fills, navigation, and main actions must use brand/accent or purple data visualization tokens.
